title: In UK Prisons, Drones Fly In Contraband ‘As if by Uber Eats’
summary_full: Decades-old prison buildings were designed to be secure from the ground but not the air. Experts say that makes a lucrative smuggling trade hard to tackle.
summary_public: Decades-old prison buildings were designed to be secure from the ground but not the air. Experts say that makes a lucrative smuggling trade hard to tackle.
